title: Loxtep approval node package (v1)
description: Schema for an approval node template. Defines a human-in-the-loop approval gate that pauses event flow pending a human decision, then routes events to an approved or rejected output path.

approval_node_id.description: Unique entity identifier for the approval node

workflow_id.description: Parent workflow this node belongs to

name.description: Human-readable name for the approval gate

approval_channel.description: Channel used to deliver approval notifications (e.g. Slack channel, email group)

timeout_hours.description: Hours before the approval request expires (1-168)

approved_queue_name.description: Output queue name for approved events; set at deploy time

rejected_queue_name.description: Output queue name for rejected/expired events; set at deploy time

upstream_entity_id.description: Entity ID of the upstream node feeding events into this approval gate

upstream_label.description: Label on the incoming edge from a branching upstream node

description.description: Optional description of the approval node's purpose

placeholders.description: Documentation for each {{PLACEHOLDER}} used in the entity block
